intentPatterns: evaluating current readiness before making a decision
mapping existing work against a framework to find gaps
scoring progress on a multi-part initiative
understanding what's been done and what's still needed
getting a structured status check on a domain or project
proactiveConditions: a session with a framework-data.json has just loaded context
user starts a decision-framework session and hasn't assessed state yet
user asks about progress or readiness in any domain
